name: roses-indoor-designs
description: Local-first 2D and 3D interior planning studio for Rose's Indoor Designs.

scripts.test: cmd /c npm run check && cmd /c npm run validate:manifest && cmd /c npm run validate:inline-handlers && cmd /c npm run validate:error-handling && cmd /c npm run validate:runtime-modules && cmd /c npm run validate:dependencies && cmd /c npm run validate:project-schema && cmd /c npm run test:self
scripts.lint: eslint scripts/main.js scripts/core/**/*.js scripts/ui/**/*.js scripts/cloud/**/*.js scripts/devtools/**/*.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --check README.md CHANGELOG.md ROADMAP.md KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md docs/**/*.md .github/**/*.md scripts/main.js scripts/core/**/*.js scripts/ui/**/*.js scripts/cloud/**/*.js scripts/devtools/**/*.mjs tests/**/*.mjs playwright.config.mjs package.json
scripts.check: node --check ./scripts/app.js && node --check ./scripts/main.js && node --check ./scripts/state.js && node --check ./scripts/storage.js && node --check ./scripts/ui.js && node --check ./scripts/ui/shortcuts.js && node --check ./scripts/planner2d.js && node --check ./scripts/catalog.js && node --check ./scripts/export.js && node --check ./scripts/planner3d.js && node --check ./scripts/walkthrough.js && node --check ./scripts/core/app-config.js && node --check ./scripts/core/error-reporting.js && node --check ./scripts/core/storage-keys.js && node --check ./scripts/core/project-schema.js && node --check ./scripts/core/app-state.js && node --check ./scripts/core/history.js && node --check ./scripts/cloud/supabase.js && node --check ./scripts/devtools/validate-inline-handlers.mjs && node --check ./scripts/devtools/validate-error-handling.mjs && node --check ./scripts/devtools/validate-runtime-modules.mjs && node --check ./scripts/devtools/validate-dependencies.mjs && node --check ./scripts/devtools/validate-project-schema.mjs && node --check ./tests/app-smoke.spec.mjs && node --check ./playwright.config.mjs
